chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Pett. No.D-1638 of 2025 DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objections at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of main case 27.10.2025 Mr. Saeed Ahmed Bhatt, Advocate for petitioner Mr. Sheeraz Fazal, Advocate for respondent-university Mr. Ali Raza Balouch, Additional Advocate General ************** Counsel for the respondent-university has filed a statement along with eight original post-dated cheques totaling Rs.67,41,496/- in respect of the petitioner’s pensionary benefits (LPR, GP Fund, Commutation) and states that nothing remains outstanding. The petitioner is present and has received the original cheques against proper receipt. Counsel for the petitioner submits that the grievance has been redressed and seeks disposal of the petition. Accordingly, the instant constitutional petition is disposed of. J U D G E J U D G E M. Ali*
